problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
mechanism: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine
hypothesis: If Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine is applied to subjective, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
